ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iris_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sepal_length" REAL /* Length of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "sepal_width" REAL /* Width of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "petal_length" REAL /* Length of the petal in centimeters */,
  "petal_width" REAL /* Width of the petal in centimeters */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the Iris flower */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment where the data was collected */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during data collection (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "measurement_accuracy" TEXT /* Flag or score indicating the accuracy of the measurements */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the Iris flower for visual reference */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person or team who collected the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iris_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iris_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species (e.g., Iris setosa, Iris versicolor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "genetic_info" TEXT /* Genetic information or a link to genetic data for the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Description of the typical habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., endangered, least concern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations from the experiment */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of researchers involved in the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES iris_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., species confirmation, measurement verification) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the annotation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "reference_link" TEXT /* Link to any supporting documentation or references for the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES iris_data ("data_id")
)
